mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_OAUTH ( user_oauth_no, user_login_no, oauth_provider, oauth_provider_id ) VALUES ( #{userOauthNo}, #{userLoginNo}, #{provider}, #{providerId} )
mapper.select: SELECT ul.user_login_no, ul.id, ul.password, ul.active FROM USER_OAUTH uo JOIN USER_LOGIN ul ON uo.user_login_no = ul.user_login_no WHERE uo.oauth_provider_id = #{oauthProviderId} AND uo.oauth_provider = #{oauthProvider} AND ul.active = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT user_oauth_no, user_login_no, oauth_provider, oauth_provider_id FROM USER_OAUTH uo WHERE uo.oauth_provider_id = #{oauthProviderId} AND uo.oauth_provider = #{oauthProvider}
SELECT r.ROLE_CD, r.ROLE_NM, r.PRIT_RNK FROM ROLE r JOIN USER_ROLE ur on r.ROLE_CD = ur.ROLE_CD WHERE ur.user_login_no = #{userLoginNo}
SELECT r.ROLE_CD, r.ROLE_NM, r.PRIT_RNK FROM USER_LOGIN ul JOIN USER_ROLE ur ON ur.USER_LOGIN_NO = ul.USER_LOGIN_NO JOIN ROLE r ON r.ROLE_CD = ur.ROLE_CD WHERE ul.ID = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER_LOGIN ul JOIN PURCHASER_PROFILE pr ON ul.user_login_no = pr.user_login_no WHERE ul.id = #{id} OR pr.phone_number = #{phoneNumber}
SELECT ul.user_login_no, ul.id, ul.password, ul.active FROM USER_LOGIN ul WHERE ul.id = #{id} AND ul.active = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT ul.user_login_no, ul.id, ul.password, ul.active FROM USER_LOGIN ul WHERE ul.user_login_no = #{userLoginNo} AND ul.active = 'ACTIVE'
